action.title: HyperPBI intensive demo
action.message: This app demonstrates the currently implemented HyperPBI component families.

pageHeader.title: City Operations Command Center
pageHeader.subtitle: Interactive executive analytics, advanced charts, maps, records and component laboratory

footer.secondaryText: Synthetic Houston operations data • Safe JSON runtime

leftPanel.title: Global Filters
leftPanel.text: Filters affect the executive views, chart gallery, map, timeline, matrix and table.

rightPanel.title: Selected Case
rightPanel.emptyText: Select a chart point, map feature, list item, timeline event, matrix cell or table row.

components.title: Interactive Demonstration
components.text: Use the left filters and select marks, map points, timeline events, matrix cells or table rows. The right detail rail updates from the selected record.

children.title: Team Note
children.text: The avatar, card, info-card and status primitives are rendered inside one reusable card.

children.title: Basic Charts
children.text:
## Basic chart gallery
These visuals use HyperPBI's built-in aggregation and ECharts renderer. Select a mark to highlight the related rows.

children.title: Advanced ECharts
children.text:
## Advanced ECharts
Combo, waterfall, radar, treemap, funnel, Sankey, calendar heatmap and box plot configurations are supplied as sanitized JSON—no JavaScript callbacks.

children.title: Monthly Operations — Cost, Volume and SLA
Map Instructions
children.text:
## Houston map laboratory
Use the Layers button to switch among clustered cases, priority symbols, proportional risk and continuous response-time coloring. Click a point to select it and update the detail rail.

children.title: Houston Operations Map — Cluster, Priority, Risk and Selection

uiAction.message: The map popup action executed successfully.

children.text: This accordion demonstrates compact secondary content.
Collapsible sections help keep an intensive dashboard manageable.
